scripts.dev: bun --env-file=../../.env run ../../packages/config/src/run.ts --modules base,web,api,storage -- bun run next dev --port 4100 --turbopack
scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production NEXT_PRIVATE_SKIP_PATCHING=1 bun --env-file=../../.env run ../../packages/config/src/run.ts --modules base,web,api,storage -- bun run next build
scripts.start: bun --env-file=../../.env run ../../packages/config/src/run.ts --modules base,web,api,storage -- bun run next start --port 4100
